passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits 3 visitors at 1/2 price admission ($9.50) per person which allows access to the Discovery Museum, as well as Discovery Woods.
Any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price of $19.
This is a virtual pass that does not need to be picked up at the Library.

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
source_phrases: Library Membership Digital Pass
Somerville Public Library
This library membership pass entitles you to up to two (2) tickets for Gallery Admission at the discounted Library Pass rate.
Pass is valid on any day the ICA is open through November 30, 2026
Library Pass tickets are $10 per ticket.
Library Passes are not valid for performances, events, or films
For current pricing and visitor information, go to: https://www.icaboston.org/visit
This is a virtual pass that will be emailed to you and must be presented at the museum to redeem the discount.

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
source_phrases: Passes are not required, but please place a reservation for the desired date of your visit.
Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket.
This offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and the visitor must present a Massachusetts library card to receive the discount.
Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission.
Please reach out to the JFK Library Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov or 617-514-1600.

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This is a virtual pass that does not need to be picked up at the Library.
Each pass now allows admission for 2 adults at $15 each (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $10.
Children 6 and under are admitted free.
source_phrases: This is a virtual pass that does not need to be picked up at the Library.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
Each coupon admits up to four people for 50% off regular admission per person at the New England Aquarium. This discount applies to full-price adult and child admission rates. Children under the age of 3 are always admitted free.
Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details. Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
ID: 25277
PLEASE BE AWARE:
· This is not a ticket.
· Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
source_phrases: Each coupon admits up to four people for 50% off regular admission per person at the New England Aquarium. This discount applies to full-price adult and child admission rates. Children under the age of 3 are always admitted free.
Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details. Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
PLEASE BE AWARE:
· This is not a ticket.
· Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
· Valid only for Aquarium admission, and only on the date printed on the coupon.
· This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.
· Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold.
· Void if altered or copied. No cash value.
· Hours of operation are subject to change.
This is a virtual pass that does not need to be picked up at the Library.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
This pass will admit 2 adults per transaction to the museum at a reduced rate of $12 per person. (Children under age 16 are always free.)
This is a virtual pass that does not need to be picked up at the Library.

passes.title: The Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text:
One pass admits up to 5 people for one visit at no charge. One pass per party, please.
Passes can be printed or shown digitally upon entering.
This is a virtual pass that does not need to be picked up at the library.
